claim_text: Metrovale transit ridership increased by 10% in 2024 compared to 2023.
The July 2024 base fare was raised to $3.00.
Electric buses in Metrovale have lower lifecycle CO2 emissions than diesel buses.
We should freeze further fare increases until 2026 because higher fares drive riders away.
The July 2024 fare hike caused ridership to drop in the second half of 2024.
